blockers: the open-weight model, documented training cutoff, license, and exact weight digest are unbound
zero of twelve post-cutoff task contracts and source/license records are admitted
hidden consequence tests and calibration controls have not been independently authored or committed
selection_rule: No candidate may be evaluated for freshness until one model and authoritative cutoff source are bound. Admission then requires the task schema, source/license custody, two independent authors, and pre-output hidden-test commitments.
